en: You should really fix that. Am I a genius? No, you're an asshole. I'm a funny guy.
Fix the door, Bender! Shh! Listen, I've been here before. I know what I'm doing.
ko: 들어봐, 나 여기 와본 적 있어.

en: No! No, shut up! Shut up, damn it!
Why is that door closed? How are we supposed to know? We're not supposed to move, right?
Why? We were just sitting here, like we're supposed to.
ko: 우리는 그냥 여기 앉아 있어, 그렇게 해야 하니까.

en: Who closed that door? I think a screw fell out of it.
She doesn't talk, sir. Give me that screw.
ko: 그녀는 말하지 않아요, 선생님. 그 나사 줘. 난 그거 없어.

en: I don't have it. You want me to yank you out of that seat and shake it out of you?
I don't have it. Screws fall out all the time. The world's an imperfect place.
